title: Print a Cable Clip
description: Reduce clutter by 3D printing a simple cable clip.

dialogue.text: Need a quick print project? Let's make a cable clip to tame those loose cords.

options.text: Sounds good. What do I need?

dialogue.text: Clean the bed, load some filament, slice the clip STL, and start the print. Keep the nozzle clear and watch the first layer stick.
Nice work! Snap it onto a cable and enjoy the tidy workspace.
